differential_diagnoses: Chronic portal vein thrombosis with portal cavernoma
next_steps: Mesenteric angiography or CT angiography to evaluate for mesenteric ischemia
Complete thrombophilia and hematologic workup (JAK2, PNH testing, Protein C/S/Antithrombin)
Liver biopsy with specialized staining for Schistosoma eggs
Evaluation for surgical or endovascular management of portal vein obstruction
